creator: etm1962@hotmail.com
text:
After downloading [ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ISO-IMAGES-i386/8.2/FreeBSD-8.2-RELEASE-i386-dvd1.iso.xz],
 I am unable to open the image with WinRAR or burn the installation DVD
with Nero9.  This is contrary to the 8.1 release which works fine with
these two applications.  Please post a repaired image and/or advise which
Windows applications can be used to make the DVD.

Fix: 

Repair corrupt image and repost.
How-To-Repeat: Download with Windows Internet Explorer.  Try to make the DVD on a Windows
XP machine with WinRAR and/or Nero9.
